zh.lifeSummary: Gwenllian ferch Ednyfed於大約1170年出生在威爾士梅利奧爾。她於大約1185年與Rhirid Flaidd Ap Gwrgenau Lord of Penllyn結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和2個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Gwenllian ferch Ednyfed于大约1170年出生在威尔士梅利奧爾。她于大约1185年与Rhirid Flaidd Ap Gwrgenau Lord of Penllyn结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和2个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Gwenllian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: from gwen, the feminine form of gwyn ‘white, fair; blessed, holy’ ( see Gwen ) + lliant ‘flood, flow’ (probably in the transferred sense ‘foamy’ or ‘white’, referring to a pale complexion).

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

en.lifeSummary: Gwenllian ferch Ednyfed was born about 1170, in Merionethshire, Wales. She married Rhirid Flaidd Ap Gwrgenau Lord of Penllyn about 1185. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 2 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Gwenllian ferch Ednyfed est née environ 1170, à Merionethshire, Galles. Elle a épousé Rhirid Flaidd Ap Gwrgenau Lord of Penllyn environ 1185. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 2 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Gwenllian ferch Ednyfed wurde um 1170 in Merionethshire, Wales geboren. Sie hat um 1185 Rhirid Flaidd Ap Gwrgenau Lord of Penllyn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 2 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Gwenllian ferch Ednyfed è nata il circa 1170 nel Merionethshire, Galles. Lei sposato Rhirid Flaidd Ap Gwrgenau Lord of Penllyn circa 1185. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 2 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: Gwenllian ferch Ednyfedは約1170年にウェールズメリオンエスシュアイアで生まれた。約1185年にRhirid Flaidd Ap Gwrgenau Lord of Penllynと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Gwenllian ferch Ednyfed(은)는 대략 1170년 웨일스 머이오네스실르에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1185년 Rhirid Flaidd Ap Gwrgenau Lord of Penllyn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Gwenllian ferch Ednyfed nasceu aproximadamente 1170, em Merionethshire, Gales. Ela casou-se com Rhirid Flaidd Ap Gwrgenau Lord of Penllyn aproximadamente 1185. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 2 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Gwenllian ferch Ednyfed родилась около 1170 г. в местности мириоунетшир, Уэльс. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Rhirid Flaidd Ap Gwrgenau Lord of Penllyn около 1185 г. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 2 дочери.

es.lifeSummary: Gwenllian ferch Ednyfed nació aproximadamente 1170, en Merionethshire, Gales. Se casó con Rhirid Flaidd Ap Gwrgenau Lord of Penllyn aproximadamente 1185. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 2 hijas.
